name: Kahlua Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square baking pan with foil.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine sugar, marshmallow creme, evaporated milk, butter, Kahlua, and salt.
3. Bring the mixture to a rapid boil, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and add all chocolate.
5. Stir until the chocolate is melted.
6. Add nuts and vanilla.
7. Turn the mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Refrigerate until firm.
9. To serve, cut into squares.
10. Makes about 2-3/4 pounds.
